ddls:
CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport category */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was purchased */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the equipment */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the equipment (e.g., new, used, refurbished) */,
  "warranty_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the warranty */,
  "warranty_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the warranty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the sport (e.g., individual, team, winter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the store */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the equipment is stocked */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the equipment in stock */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the equipment (e.g., available, reserved, maintenance) */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Last date the stock was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance entry */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment */,
  "service_date" TEXT /* Date the service was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "membership_level" TEXT /* Membership level of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of usage in minutes */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., rental, demo) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_usage_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_usage_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of appointment (e.g., fitting, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment */,
  "reservation_date" TEXT /* Date the reservation was made */,
  "pickup_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment is to be picked up */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment is to be returned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the sale was made */,
  "sale_price" TEXT /* Price of the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retirements" (
  "retirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retirement */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment */,
  "retirement_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was retired */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for retirement (e.g., damage, obsolescence) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retirements_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment */,
  "from_store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store the equipment was transferred from */,
  "to_store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store the equipment was transferred to */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date the transfer was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_to_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_from_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each piece of equipment
Condition of the equipment (e.g., new, used, refurbished)
Category of the sport (e.g., individual, team, winter)

Status of the equipment (e.g., available, reserved, maintenance)
Last date the stock was updated
